feat_pal_lay_on_hands.name: Lay on Hands
feat_pal_lay_on_hands.description: Restore HP from a pool equal to 5x your level as a Bonus Action. Can also spend 5 HP to cure Poison.

feat_pal_spellcasting.name: Paladin's Spellcasting
feat_pal_spellcasting.description: Cast spells using prayer and a holy symbol. Charisma is your spellcasting ability.

feat_pal_fighting_style.name: Fighting Style
feat_pal_fighting_style.description: Choose a Fighting Style to reflect your martial training.

fs_defense.name: Defense
fs_defense.description: While you are wearing armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC.

fs_dueling.name: Dueling
fs_dueling.description: When you are wielding a melee weapon in one hand and no other weapons, you gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls with that weapon.

fs_great_weapon.name: Great Weapon Fighting
fs_great_weapon.description: When you roll a 1 or 2 on a damage die for an attack you make with a melee weapon that you are wielding with two hands, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.

fs_blessed_warrior.name: Blessed Warrior
fs_blessed_warrior.description: You learn two Cleric cantrips of your choice.

feat_pal_smite.name: Paladin's Smite
feat_pal_smite.description: You always have Divine Smite prepared and can cast it once per long rest without a slot as a Bonus Action immediately after hitting a creature with a melee weapon.

feat_pal_channel_divinity.name: Channel Divinity
feat_pal_channel_divinity.description: Fuel magical effects. You gain Divine Sense as an Action and additional options from your Oath.

feat_pal_oath.name: Sacred Oath
feat_pal_oath.description: You choose an oath that defines your holy mission.

feat_pal_asi_4.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_pal_asi_4.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1. Alternativamente, podes escolher um Talento.

feat_pal_extra_attack.name: Extra Attack
feat_pal_extra_attack.description: Attack twice whenever you take the Attack Action.

feat_pal_faithful_steed.name: Faithful Steed
feat_pal_faithful_steed.description: You always have Find Steed prepared. You can cast it once per long rest without expending a spell slot.

feat_pal_aura_protection.name: Aura of Protection
feat_pal_aura_protection.description: You and allies within 10ft gain a bonus to saves equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum +1).

feat_pal_asi_8.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_pal_asi_8.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1. Alternativamente, podes escolher um Talento.

feat_pal_abjure_foes.name: Abjure Foes
feat_pal_abjure_foes.description: As an Action, you can present your Holy Symbol and use Channel Divinity to magically command creatures up to 60ft to grovel.

feat_pal_aura_courage.name: Aura of Courage
feat_pal_aura_courage.description: You and allies within 10ft can't be Frightened while you are conscious.

feat_pal_radiant_strikes.name: Radiant Strikes
feat_pal_radiant_strikes.description: Your melee weapon attacks deal an extra 1d8 Radiant damage on a hit.

feat_pal_asi_12.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_pal_asi_12.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1. Alternativamente, podes escolher um Talento.

feat_pal_asi_16.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_pal_asi_16.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1. Alternativamente, podes escolher um Talento.

feat_pal_aura_expansion.name: Aura Expansion
feat_pal_aura_expansion.description: The range of all your Auras increases to 30ft.

feat_pal_asi_19.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_pal_asi_19.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1. Alternativamente, podes escolher um Talento.

feat_og_tenets.name: Tenets of Glory
feat_og_tenets.description: Endeavor to be known by deeds, face hardship with courage, and inspire others.

feat_og_inspiring_smite.name: Inspiring Smite
feat_og_inspiring_smite.description: Immediately after casting Divine Smite, you can use Channel Divinity as a Bonus Action to distribute Temporary HP to allies equal to 2d8 + level.

feat_og_peerless_athlete.name: Peerless Athlete
feat_og_peerless_athlete.description: Use Channel Divinity as a Bonus Action to gain Advantage on Athletics and Acrobatics checks, and your jump distance increases by 10ft.

feat_og_aura_alacrity.name: Aura of Alacrity
feat_og_aura_alacrity.description: Your speed increases by 10ft. Allies that start their turn in your Aura of Protection gain 10ft of speed until the end of their turn.

feat_og_glorious_defense.name: Glorious Defense
feat_og_glorious_defense.description: When you or an ally within 10ft is hit by an attack, use a Reaction to grant a bonus to AC equal to your Charisma modifier. If the attack misses, you can make a weapon attack as part of the same Reaction.

feat_og_living_legend.name: Living Legend
feat_og_living_legend.description: As a Bonus Action, transform into a legend for 1 minute: Advantage on Charisma checks, once per turn when you miss an attack you can cause it to hit instead, and you can use a Reaction to reroll a failed saving throw.

subclasses.name: Oath of Glory
subclasses.description: Paladins of glory believe they and those around them are destined for greatness.
